creator: Cy.Schubert@komquats.com
text:
I have a similar board in my testbed, K9VGM-V, Semron 3000+. Sound is supposed to work under 7.0-CURRENT. I've yet to test it though, too much other stuff on my plate. You might want to try 7.0.

-- 
Cheers,
Cy Schubert <Cy.Schubert@komquats.com>
